advancement.otherworld.story.dragons_and: Reopen the gateway to the End.
advancement.otherworld.story.elemental_m: Unlock the secrets of the Nexus.
advancement.otherworld.story.first_zombi: An ancient rumbling grows beneath the Otherworld...
advancement.otherworld.story.nexus_escap: Enter the portal to The End.
advancement.otherworld.story.nightwarden: At The End of All Things
block.otherworld.nexus_altar.grand_ritua: The altar emits a powerful energy.
block.otherworld.nexus_altar.processing_: The altar emits a powerful energy.
item.otherworld.challenge_orb.claimed: Cannot regenerate %s - structure contains claimed chunks
item.otherworld.challenge_orb.found: Found structure: %s. Click again to regenerate.
item.otherworld.challenge_orb.players_pr: Warning: Other players are present in %s
item.otherworld.challenge_orb.tooltip: Regenerates a nearby dungeon, even if you've regenerated it before. Consumed on use.
item.otherworld.challenge_orb.tooltip_by: Bypasses activity/player-presence checks, but not claimed areas.
item.otherworld.chaos_orb.wrong_dimensio: This orb must be unleashed in the Overworld.
item.otherworld.death_stone.tooltip: A stone that whispers with the voices of the departed. Its cold touch saps life from everything it contacts.
item.otherworld.earth_stone.tooltip: A stone pressed together by the weight of an entire world. It feels unnaturally heavy.
item.otherworld.fire_stone.tooltip: A stone that holds within an eternal flame. Even when submerged in water, it remains hot to the touch.
item.otherworld.ice_stone.tooltip: A stone that remains perpetually frozen. The air around it chills, forming a permanent frost layer.
item.otherworld.life_stone.tooltip: A stone pulsing with the essence of life itself. It radiates a gentle warmth.
item.otherworld.lightning_stone.tooltip: A stone crackling with chaotic energy. Small arcs of lightning occasionally dance across its surface.
item.otherworld.necklace_of_sorrow.toolt: An amulet tainted by centuries of grief and regret. It radiates immense dread.
item.otherworld.obsidian_mirror.tooltip: Use it in a place where elements converge, and you might see something unexpected.
item.otherworld.obsidian_mirror.wrong_di: Nothing looks out of the ordinary.
item.otherworld.town_portal_scroll.coold: Town Portal is still on cooldown for %s
item.otherworld.town_portal_scroll.telep: No respawn location found. Teleporting to world spawn.
item.otherworld.town_portal_scroll.toolt: Channel to teleport to your bed, or to the world spawn if you have no bed. Cooldown: 10 minutes
item.otherworld.town_portal_scroll.wrong: This item can only be used in the Overworld
item.otherworld.void_compass.cooldown: The compass needs time to re-attune.
item.otherworld.void_compass.tooltip: Follows the echoes of the void.
item.otherworld.wayfinders_medallion.act: Medallion activated, but automatic regeneration is disabled in config
item.otherworld.wayfinders_medallion.aut: Warning: Automatic regeneration is disabled in config
item.otherworld.wayfinders_medallion.too: While enabled, automatically regenerate most dungeons the first time you visit them.
Only works if held, or equipped in the charm slot.
message.otherworld.altar.mismatch: The altar doesn't seem to react to this object.
message.otherworld.altar.occupied: The altar's focus must be cleared. Click with an empty hand to remove the current item.
message.otherworld.end_portal.teleport_f: Teleportation Failed. Report to Modpack Developer
message.otherworld.nexus.night_vision_su: A smothering energy in the Nexus suppresses your enhanced vision.
message.otherworld.ritual.death_stone.su: The Necklace dissolves, releasing its grief into the stone...
message.otherworld.ritual.earth_stone.fa: The core pulses weakly. It needs a specific environment within the Nether, surrounded by Blackstone, to fully stabilize.
message.otherworld.ritual.earth_stone.su: Striking the core channels the raw energy of the Nether through the ancient debris, solidifying it into an Earth Stone!
message.otherworld.ritual.ice_stone.cond: The heart remains dormant. It requires extreme cold, high altitude, and the night sky.
message.otherworld.ritual.ice_stone.fail: The heart shatters into inert shards. The conditions were not right for transformation.
message.otherworld.ritual.ice_stone.plac: The Ice Dragon Heart settles onto the frigid surface, beginning to absorb the cold...
message.otherworld.ritual.ice_stone.succ: The heart shatters, releasing its frozen core as an Ice Stone!
message.otherworld.ritual.life_stone.fai: The offering feels out of place here. It belongs in a sacred, celestial place.
message.otherworld.ritual.life_stone.suc: The offering dissolves into pure life energy, coalescing into a vibrant stone.
message.otherworld.ritual.lightning_ston: The heart crackles, awaiting a direct strike from a storm.

screen.otherworld.boss_narration.title: THE ARCHITECT SPEAKS
text.autoconfig.otherworld.option.additi: Individual structure IDs (in the format 'modid:structure_name') that should also be able to be regenerated with Challenge Orbs.
text.autoconfig.otherworld.option.allowe: Mod IDs of structures which should all be able to be regenerated with Challenge Orbs.
text.autoconfig.otherworld.option.autoRe: How often to check if a player is in a regenerable structure (in ticks).
Maximum distance from player to detect structures for auto-regeneration (in blocks).
text.autoconfig.otherworld.option.cancel: Whether fully passive mobs (cows, chickens, etc.) should always be level 1.
Only works if Autoleveling and Passive Skill Tree are both installed.
text.autoconfig.otherworld.option.enable: Whether structures should automatically regenerate when players enter them for the first time.
Respects activity checks and claimed chunk protection.
text.autoconfig.otherworld.option.leveli: The radius to search for players with skill tree points when adding to mob levels, in blocks.
text.autoconfig.otherworld.option.levels: The number of additional levels to add to mobs per average point in the skill tree of nearby players.
text.autoconfig.otherworld.option.struct: How long a structure must be inactive before it can be regenerated (in seconds).
Search radius for nearby structures when using the Challenge Orb, in Chunks.
Configure which structures can be regenerated by Challenge Orbs, Exploration Orbs, and Auto-regeneration.
Use allowedNamespaces for mod IDs and additionalStructures for specific structure resource locations.
Specific structure IDs (format: 'modid:structure_name') that should be regenerable.
Mod IDs whose structures should all be regenerable.
Structure IDs that should never be regenerated, even if their namespace is allowed.
tooltip.level.hint: Put points into your Aptitudes to level up!
tooltip.level.max: You are at the max level.
tooltip.otherworld.aptitude.story_restri: Story progression required: Complete %s to level further.
